title: AOD-9604 Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: AOD-9604 is a modified fragment of human growth hormone (176–191) designed to stimulate lipolysis without significantly affecting IGF-1 or blood glucose pathways. Below are 15 curated protocol variations for different goals — from beginner fat loss to stage prep.

core_info.function: Fat loss, metabolic support, lipolysis activation.

protocols.name: Beginner Fat Loss Stack
protocols.goal: Entry-level fat loss and metabolic activation.

protocols.name: Rapid Cut Stack
protocols.goal: Aggressive short-term fat reduction.

protocols.name: Keto Fat Adaptation Stack
protocols.goal: Ketosis optimization and metabolic flexibility.

protocols.name: Women's Hormonal Shred Stack
protocols.goal: Female hormonal fat-loss support.
protocols.best_for: Women over 35 and hormonal fat distribution.

protocols.name: Visceral Fat & Insulin Reset Stack
protocols.goal: Reduce visceral fat and improve insulin sensitivity.
protocols.best_for: Abdominal fat and metabolic syndrome profiles.

protocols.name: Recomp & Lean Physique Stack
protocols.goal: Body recomposition while preserving lean mass.

protocols.name: Busy Lifestyle Fat Loss Stack
protocols.goal: Stress-friendly fat loss support.

protocols.name: Appetite Control Stack
protocols.goal: Craving reduction and appetite management.

protocols.name: Athletic Conditioning Stack
protocols.goal: Performance-focused cutting and conditioning.

protocols.name: Recovery & Metabolic Reset Stack
protocols.goal: Recovery support with metabolic restoration.

protocols.name: Fasted Morning GH Burn Stack
protocols.goal: Maximum fasted-state fat oxidation.
protocols.best_for: Morning training and advanced fat burning.

protocols.name: Anti-Bloat & Dry Look Stack
protocols.goal: Reduce water retention and tighten appearance.

protocols.name: Long-Term Sustainable Cut Stack
protocols.goal: Gradual long-term fat reduction.

protocols.name: Shift Worker Metabolic Stack
protocols.goal: Support metabolism during circadian disruption.

protocols.name: Ultra-Lean Stage Prep Stack
protocols.goal: Extreme conditioning and final-stage fat reduction.
protocols.best_for: Stage prep and ultra-lean physique goals.

title: BPC-157 Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: BPC-157 is a synthetic peptide derived from the Body Protection Compound found in gastric juice. Known for tissue repair, anti-inflammatory and cytoprotective effects, with applications spanning gut health, joints, tendons, and muscle recovery.

core_info.function: Accelerates healing of muscles, tendons, ligaments, and gut tissue. Anti-inflammatory and cytoprotective.
core_info.best_timing: Anytime; often near training or injury site

protocols.name: Gut Repair & Integrity Stack
protocols.goal: Heal the GI tract, reduce digestive inflammation, recover after antibiotic use.
protocol: Combine BPC-157, Zinc Carnosine, and L-Glutamine.
Administer as per individual compound instructions.
protocols.best_for: Leaky gut, digestive inflammation, post-antibiotic recovery

protocols.name: Joint & Connective Tissue Stack
protocols.goal: Promote repair and regeneration of joints, tendons, and ligaments.

protocols.name: Chronic Inflammation Reset Stack
protocols.goal: Reduce systemic inflammation and autoimmune-related fatigue.
protocol: Take Curcumin and Fish Oil with meals.
protocols.best_for: Chronic inflammation, autoimmune discomfort, systemic fatigue

protocols.name: Anti-Aging Regeneration Stack
protocols.goal: Support longevity, cellular regeneration, and optimize recovery.
protocol: Administer as per individual compound instructions.

protocols.name: Tendon & Ligament Rapid Repair Stack
protocols.goal: Accelerate healing of microtears and strains in soft tissue.
protocol: Administer as per individual compound instructions.
protocols.best_for: Tendon microtears, ligament strain, soft tissue injuries

protocols.name: Daily Recovery Maintenance Stack
protocols.goal: Support daily recovery and adaptation for high-volume training.

protocols.name: High-Volume Training Recovery Stack
protocols.goal: Enhance recovery and support hypertrophy during high-frequency training.
protocol: Add TB-500 if desired for enhanced connective tissue support.

protocols.name: CrossFit & HIIT Recovery Stack
protocols.goal: Optimize recovery from HIIT and CrossFit activities.
protocol: Combine BPC-157, TB-500, and IGF-1 LR3.
Administer as per individual compound instructions.

protocols.name: Endurance Joint Protection Stack
protocols.goal: Protect joints and support recovery for endurance athletes.

protocols.name: Plantar Fascia & Foot Recovery Stack
protocols.goal: Aid healing of plantar fasciitis and running foot injuries.
protocol: Administer as per individual compound instructions.

protocols.name: Functional Fitness Tissue Conditioning Stack
protocols.goal: Enhance tissue conditioning and overall mobility.

protocols.name: Deload Week Regenerative Stack
protocols.goal: Facilitate recovery and regeneration during deload phases.
protocol: Administer as per individual compound instructions.

protocols.name: Fasted Training Preservation Stack
protocols.goal: Preserve muscle mass and aid recovery during fasted training.
protocol: Administer as per individual compound instructions.

protocols.name: Injury Prevention & Prehab Stack
protocols.goal: Support injury prevention and prepare tissues for high-volume training.

protocols.name: Gut-Muscle Axis Recovery Stack
protocols.goal: Support GI stress and digestive recovery for the gut-muscle axis.

title: CJC-1295 Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: CJC-1295 is a synthetic analog of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) that stimulates the pituitary to increase natural GH secretion. The DAC version offers a long half-life (weekly dosing); the no-DAC version is short-acting (pulse-style).

core_info.function: Growth hormone stimulation, recovery optimization, anti-aging support, body recomposition and fat loss.
core_info.typical_dosage: DAC: 1–2 mg weekly  |  no-DAC: 100–300 mcg daily
core_info.best_timing: Varies by protocol — often pre-workout or pre-bed

protocols.name: GH Optimization & Recomposition Stack
protocols.goal: Body recomposition and lean muscle retention.
protocol: Administer CJC-1295 DAC at 2 mg weekly.
protocols.best_for: Body recomposition and lean muscle retention

protocols.name: Muscle Preservation & Sarcopenia Stack
protocols.goal: Muscle preservation and combating sarcopenia.
protocol: Administer CJC-1295 no DAC at 200 mcg.

protocols.name: Longevity & Hormonal Optimization Stack
protocols.goal: Longevity and hormonal optimization.

protocols.name: Post-Fast GH Pulse Stack
protocols.goal: GH pulse after fasting.

protocols.name: Pre-Workout Fat Oxidation Stack
protocols.goal: Fat oxidation before workouts.

protocols.name: HIIT Performance & Fat Adaptation Stack
protocols.goal: Performance and fat adaptation during HIIT.

protocols.name: Glycemic Reset Stack
protocols.goal: Glycemic reset and glucose control.

protocols.name: Sleep Optimization GH Stack
protocols.goal: Sleep support, especially during dieting.

protocols.name: Post-Cheat Day Metabolic Reset Stack
protocols.goal: Metabolic reset after cheat days or refeeds.

protocols.name: Slow Metabolism Repair Stack
protocols.goal: Repair slow metabolism in low-energy/chronic dieting.

protocols.name: Appetite & Mood Stability Stack
protocols.goal: Appetite and mood stability.

protocols.name: Insulin Sensitivity Enhancement Stack
protocols.goal: Enhance insulin sensitivity and metabolic flexibility.
protocol: Take 500 mg of Berberine twice per day.

protocols.name: Anti-Cortisol Body Composition Stack
protocols.goal: Reduce cortisol and improve body composition.

protocols.name: High-Stress Metabolism Support Stack
protocols.goal: Support metabolism during high stress.

protocols.name: Post-Menopause Body Composition Stack
protocols.goal: Body composition support post-menopause.

title: PT-141 Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: PT-141 is a melanocortin receptor agonist that stimulates MC-3 and MC-4 receptors in the brain, enhancing sexual arousal through central nervous system pathways — not direct vascular mechanisms.

core_info.function: Libido enhancement, erectile support, sexual desire enhancement for men and women.
core_info.common_cycle: As-needed only — not for daily use

protocols.name: Libido & Performance Enhancement Stack
protocols.goal: Enhance libido, arousal, mood, confidence, and overall sexual performance.
protocol: PT-141: Inject 1.75 mg subcutaneously 45–60 min before sexual activity. Not for daily use.
Melanotan II: 0.25–1 mg, 2–3x weekly. Start low to assess tolerance.
Selank: 250–500 mcg intranasally 1–2x daily or as needed for calmness and mood.
protocols.best_for: Libido support, sexual wellness optimization, confidence enhancement

title: DSIP Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: DSIP (Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide) is a naturally occurring peptide in mammals that promotes delta-wave activity during deep sleep stages. It influences corticotropin release and neuroendocrine regulation, supporting adrenal recovery and reducing chronic stress.

core_info.function: Sleep induction, stress reduction, hormonal balance, nervous system recovery.

protocols.name: Sleep Optimization + Recovery Stack
protocols.goal: Enhance deep sleep cycles, hormonal balance, and overnight recovery.
protocol: Administer DSIP subcutaneously 30 min before bedtime.
Inject Epitalon subcutaneously twice weekly in the evening.
Combine CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin and inject subcutaneously at night.
Take magnesium glycinate orally with a light evening meal.
protocols.best_for: Poor sleep quality, nighttime restlessness, stress-related fatigue

protocols.name: Deep Sleep & Regenerative Hormone Support Stack
protocols.goal: Increase deep sleep quality, improve GH pulses, and enhance overnight recovery.
protocol: Inject DSIP subcutaneously 30 min before bedtime.
Take magnesium and glycine together 1 hour before sleep.
protocols.best_for: Sleep disturbances, burnout recovery, nighttime cortisol issues

title: GHK-Cu Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: GHK-Cu is a copper-binding tripeptide naturally present in human plasma. It supports collagen synthesis, tissue remodeling, antioxidant defense, and hair follicle stimulation.

core_info.function: Skin regeneration, wound healing, anti-aging, hair growth.

protocols.name: Skin Collagen Remodeling & Firmness Stack
protocols.goal: Stimulate collagen production, improve elasticity, and reduce wrinkles.
protocol: Mix 2 mg of GHK-Cu with 5 mL distilled water.
Do not wash off for at least 6 hours.

protocols.name: Anti-Fibrotic & Skin Elasticity Restoration Stack
protocols.goal: Improve elasticity and skin structure.
protocol: Inject GHK-Cu and TB-500 twice weekly.

protocols.name: Anti-Glycation Skin Rejuvenation Protocol
protocols.goal: Reduce glycation damage and improve tone.
protocol: Apply GHK-Cu daily to face and neck.
Take carnosine and ALA with meals.

protocols.name: Cardiovascular & Endothelial Protection Stack
protocols.goal: Support circulation and vascular health.

protocols.name: Advanced Collagen Synthesis & Firmness Stack
protocols.goal: Enhance collagen density and firmness.
protocol: Take vitamin C and amino acids with meals.

protocols.name: Aging Skin Rejuvenation Stack
protocols.goal: Improve elasticity and reduce fine lines.
protocol: Inject GHK-Cu in the morning on alternating days.
Inject Epitalon in the evening twice weekly.
Mix collagen into a morning smoothie.

protocols.name: Light Rejuvenation & Beginner Anti-Aging Stack
protocols.goal: Promote collagen support and hydration.

title: IGF-1 LR3 Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: A modified IGF-1 with extended half-life that promotes nitrogen retention, protein synthesis and hyperplasia while resisting IGF-binding proteins for superior bioavailability.

core_info.function: Muscle growth, recovery, fat loss, cellular regeneration.

protocols.name: Anabolic Response Window
protocols.goal: Boost hypertrophy, glucose uptake, and accelerate recovery.
protocol: Reconstitute IGF-1 LR3 with bacteriostatic water.
Inject intramuscularly into the trained muscle.

protocols.name: Post-Leg Day Reinforcement
protocols.goal: Fast quad/hamstring recovery, reduce soreness, improve adaptation.
protocol: Administer IGF-1 LR3 intramuscularly into quads post-leg training.
Use TB-500 weekly if extra repair needed.

protocols.name: CNS Recovery & Neuromuscular Reset
protocols.goal: Rebalance the nervous system and restore strength output.
protocol: Inject TB-500 subcutaneously at end of training week.
Use IGF-1 LR3 IM after CNS-heavy training.
Cycle weekly during high neurological loads.

protocols.name: Fasted Training Tissue Preservation
protocols.goal: Prevent muscle loss and aid post-fasted recovery.
protocol: Inject IGF-1 LR3 immediately post fasted training.

protocols.name: High-Volume Recovery Stack
protocols.goal: Prevent overtraining fatigue and restore intensity.
protocol: Inject BPC-157 daily during deload weeks.
Use IGF-1 LR3 post-training every other session.
TB-500 weekly if fatigue is high.

protocols.name: Microdosing Power Builder
protocols.goal: Lean muscle growth, recovery, and strength.
protocol: Draw 20 mcg and inject IM post-workout.

protocols.name: Age-Adjusted Anabolic Recovery
protocols.goal: Faster recovery for aging athletes, retain strength, protect joints.
protocol: Monitor recovery and reduce frequency if needed.

protocols.name: Lean Mass Rebuilder
protocols.goal: Enhance lean mass retention and faster recovery.
protocol: Take creatine daily with post-workout shake.
protocols.best_for: Lean muscle gain during low-calorie phases

protocols.name: Muscle Density & Repair Stabilization
protocols.goal: Improve muscle quality and aid recovery from overtraining.
protocol: Inject IGF-1 LR3 into target muscle post heavy session.
Use TB-500 weekly for deeper tissue support.

protocols.name: Lagging Body Parts IM Cycle
protocols.goal: Stimulate underdeveloped muscles via localized hypertrophy.
protocol: Inject directly into the lagging muscle group post-training.
Use 4–5 days/week targeting different weak points.
protocols.best_for: Lifters bringing up weak body parts

protocols.name: Neural-Muscular Coordination
protocols.goal: Enhance motor control, neural drive, and synaptic plasticity.
protocol: Inject IGF-1 LR3 into trained muscles post fine-motor exercises.
Take ALCAR daily in the morning.

protocols.name: Glycogen Recovery Timing Cycle
protocols.goal: Enhance glycogen re-synthesis and restore endurance.
protocol: Inject IGF-1 LR3 post workout into large muscle group.
Consume carbs within 15 minutes of injection.

protocols.name: Strength Plateau Breakthrough
protocols.goal: Boost strength progression and output.

protocols.name: Functional Mass Builder
protocols.goal: Lean muscle gain and joint resilience.
protocol: Inject IGF-1 LR3 IM into trained muscle.
Follow sessions with a protein-rich meal.

title: Ipamorelin Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: Ipamorelin is a synthetic pentapeptide that mimics ghrelin to selectively stimulate GH release from the pituitary, with minimal impact on cortisol or prolactin.

core_info.function: Selective growth hormone release without affecting other hormones.

protocols.name: Pre-Workout Mild Energy Enhancer
protocols.goal: Energy enhancement, fat oxidation, GH release, blood flow.
protocol: Take caffeine and beetroot mixed in water.

protocols.name: Pre-Workout GH Peptide Energy Cycle
protocols.goal: Promotes blood flow, GH spike, and recovery.
protocol: Inject Ipamorelin 30 min before fasted workouts.
Mix Arginine and Citrulline in a pre-workout shake.

protocols.name: Post-Fast GH Pulse Enhancement
protocols.goal: Amplify post-fasting GH surge, retain muscle, speed metabolic recovery.
protocol: Inject Ipamorelin + CJC-1295 immediately after breaking a fast.
Rehydrate with a full-spectrum electrolyte drink.

protocols.name: Hormonal Balance Stack for Women 40+
protocols.goal: Hormonal rhythm support, skin/hair, mood stability.
protocol: Inject GHK-Cu in the morning, 3 days/week.

protocols.name: High-Protein Diet Peptide Enhancer
protocols.goal: Satiety, recovery, optimized protein metabolism.
protocol: Magnesium before bed for muscle recovery.

protocols.name: Nighttime Fat Burn + Deep Sleep
protocols.goal: Sleep quality, GH release overnight, fat burning.
protocol: Avoid screens and stimulants after injection.

protocols.name: Muscle Preservation & Sarcopenia Stack
protocols.goal: Lean muscle, GH release, strength support.
protocol: Inject Ipamorelin + CJC-1295 together SC before bed.
Daily injections 8 weeks, then 2 weeks off.

title: Selank Stack Library
subtitle: Premium Protocol Collection
description: Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide based on tuftsin that modulates immune and nervous systems. Enhances serotonin and GABA activity for anxiety reduction and cognitive clarity.

protocols.name: Weekend Brain Focus + Calm Blend
protocols.goal: Relaxed focus, mental sharpness, emotional balance.
protocol: Administer Selank in the morning via nasal spray.
Take L-Theanine and magnesium with first meal.
Use for 2–3 consecutive days during downtime.

protocols.name: Stress Resilience & Mood Modulation
protocols.goal: Reduces anxiety, supports stress management, stabilizes mood.
protocol: Take ashwagandha + magnesium with first meal.

protocols.name: Adrenal Health + Mood Balance
protocols.goal: Stabilize cortisol, reduce anxiety, recover from chronic stress.
protocol: Take Ashwagandha with breakfast or lunch.

protocols.name: Mood Stability + Anxiety Reduction
protocols.goal: Calm anxiety, emotional resilience, mood regulation.
protocol: Use Selank in morning or before stressful tasks.
protocols.best_for: Stress-induced mood swings, mild anxiety, burnout

protocols.name: Public Speaking Mental Edge
protocols.goal: Vocal clarity, reduced social anxiety, presence.
protocol: Take Citicoline + Rhodiola 90 min before event.

protocols.name: Performance Anxiety Reduction
protocols.goal: Reduce anticipatory stress, calm the mind, improve clarity.
protocol: L-Theanine + Holy Basil earlier in the day.

protocols.name: Brain Fog Reset with Adaptogens
protocols.goal: Calm mental clutter, reset neurotransmitters, improve energy.
protocol: Use Selank late morning or before focus tasks.
Vitamin C mid-afternoon to reduce cortisol.

protocols.name: Creative Flow State Enhancer
protocols.goal: Verbal fluency, reduced inner chatter, idea flow.
protocol: L-Theanine + phosphatidylserine 30 min before creative task.
Sip cold-brew green tea slowly while working.

protocols.name: High-Stakes Presentation Clarity
protocols.goal: Sharpen speech, reduce anxiety, improve confidence and recall.

Add creatine to a morning shake.

Selank in afternoon during high-stress phases.
L-Theanine with or without caffeine as needed.
